ksa_text: Collect and integrate data from databases, APIs, external sources, and organizational systems, including identifying data consolidation opportunities and integrating information across disparate sources to support analytical workflows.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to develop dashboards to better visualize data

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology
Ability to develop dashboards to better visualize data

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-T-002 (Core Abilities/Task) scores 0.421 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.421) and is edge_case for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, O*NET signal (0.421), and Core Abilities handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support this Core Ability as a distinct Data Engineer competency at IC/senior IC level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: General abilities appear implicitly in DE postings but rarely as discrete competencies. When explicit, they appear in context of pipeline design, data modeling, or quality enforcement (DE signals here: 1, composite: 0.421).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. General ability without sufficient DE-specific context is not a distinct market requirement. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. General ability without sufficient DE-specific context is not a distinct market requirement. Final decision: exclude.
